articles.title: Ranveer Singh Cheers On Arsenal 'Family' After Champions League Loss: Fought Like Lions
articles.description: Ranveer Singh supported his favourite team, Arsenal, after they lost in the UEFA Champions League. In his IG Story, he praised them, saying they "fought like lions" and called them his "family."

articles.title: Lamine Yamal and Ines Garcia go viral as dinner date clip triggers unexpected fan reaction
articles.description: Lamine Yamal went viral after a restaurant video showed girlfriend Ines Garcia feeding him during a dinner date. The clip sparked mixed reactions online ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026. Garcia later spoke about dealing with public criticism. Meanwhile, Yamal remains focused on football after a standout season with Barcelona.

articles.title: June 2026 Horoscope: What the stars have in store for each zodiac sign
articles.description: June Monthly Horoscope 2026: Let's delve into the astrological insights based on the zodiac signs, as per a Vedic astrologer's predictions.

articles.title: From Off Campus To Bridgerton: 7 OTT Series, Films Leads With Magical Chemistry
articles.description: The streaming series and features released in 2026 have all been about the chemistry. The leads of these OTT titles have proven their spark, which is why audiences are so interested in the love stories they portray.

articles.title: “She wanted this over quietly”: Blake Lively reportedly takes fresh steps to get back in Taylor Swift’s life before wedding to Travis Kelce
articles.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have had a lot of things on their plates in the last few months as they stayed busy with their wedding preparations and professional commitments, while handling the frenzy around their bond with Blake Lively, as many remain curious. While the billionaire pop star has maintained her distance from Blake Lively, it seems the Hollywood actress has been trying her best to get back in touch.

articles.title: Trump Can't Stop GUSHING Over 'Handsome' Football Star After Latter’s BIZARRE Love Confession
articles.description: President Donald Trump is going viral after sharing a bizarre story about a man he initially thought was a male model. The President revealed that New York Giants quarterback Jaxson Dart told him quote, I love you, sir, before Trump showered the NFL rookie with compliments, calling him a beautiful guy and admitting he wished he looked like him. The remarks have sparked fresh social media reactions, controversy, and debate over Trump's latest headline-grabbing comments.

articles.title: FACT CHECK: Vashu Bhagnani Facing Rs 100 Crore Legal Action Over PVR Inox Pictures Three-Film Deal?
articles.description: Reports claiming that Vashu Bhagnani is likely to face legal action over a Rs 100 crore three-film deal with PVR Inox Pictures are false. The official handle of the distributor has issued a statement, rubbishing rumours.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Mother Teresa: 'It is easy to love the people far away. It is not always easy to love those close to us...' ; life lessons from celebrated Catholic saint
articles.description: Mother Teresa's words highlight a profound truth. Loving those distant is simple, but cherishing those at home presents challenges. Familiarity can breed friction. In today's digital age, we often focus on global causes, neglecting those nearest. The message urges us to prioritize our immediate relationships, fostering love within our own homes. This is where true connection begins.

articles.title: Bobby Deol reveals both his sons Aryaman and Dharam want to become actors: 'I thought my elder son would settle in America'
articles.description: Bobby Deol has revealed that both his sons, Aryaman and Dharam, are keen on pursuing careers in the entertainment industry, despite his efforts to expose them to different career paths. Speaking on Aap Ki Adalat, Bobby opened up about his children's interests, their talents and why the lure of cinema continues to attract the next generation of the Deol family.

articles.title: Storytellers of the magic mountain
articles.description: This anthology gathers Himalayan folklore, myths and legends from Ladakh to Arunachal Pradesh. Edited by Namita Gokhale and Malashri Lal, it celebrates oral traditions, nature, spirits and communities, preserving stories for generations.

articles.title: Peddi Actors Ram Charan, Janhvi Kapoor Discuss Normal Upbringing Despite Being Star Kids - Exclusive
articles.description: In a conversation with Times Group Editor-in-Chief Navika Kumar, Peddi stars Ram Charan and Janhvi Kapoor spoke about being raised in normal households as star kids. They did not know about their parents' stardom.

articles.title: 27-yr-old gives Konkani new expression through qawwali
articles.description: 27-year-old Vasco singer Nawab Gaffar Shaikh adapts Konkani lyrics into a qawwali, creating a new musical expression and drawing praise at a Goa event.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Monica Bellucci: 'After a while in marriage, it doesn't work anymore...' - controversial quote from the 'Malèna' actress
articles.description: Actress Monica Bellucci offers a candid view on marriage. She notes that relationships change and what was once loved can become a source of frustration. Bellucci suggests that enduring marriages are rare, demanding constant work, patience, and communication from both partners. Her words challenge idealized notions of romance, emphasizing the need to navigate difficulties together.

articles.title: 40% of urban women in Maharashtra are obese, but proportion in south India is higher
articles.description: NFHS-6: 31.1% of women in Maharashtra are overweight/obese, rising to 40.1% in urban areas; South Indian states report higher urban obesity rates.

articles.title: Where is Jasmine Dhunna? Deepak Ramsay opens up on the mystery behind Veerana star’s disappearance: ‘She stopped taking calls’
articles.description: Nearly four decades after Veerana turned her into one of Bollywood’s most unforgettable cult figures, actress Jasmine Dhunna continues to remain one of the industry's biggest mysteries. Now, filmmaker Deepak Ramsay has opened up about the actress’ sudden disappearance, revealing that even the Ramsay family no longer knows where she is.

articles.title: Kelly Curtis Cause of Death: Actress and Daughter of Tony Curtis and Janet Leigh Dies at 69
articles.description: Kelly was the firstborn child of two of Hollywood's biggest names, actor Tony Curtis and actress Janet Leigh. Her introduction to the screen came before she could even speak, appearing as a toddler in the 1958 adventure film The Vikings.

articles.title: Trump blasts performers exiting Freedom 250 concerts
articles.description: As a wave of concert cancellations for America's 250th anniversary celebrations is upsetting President Trump to the point that he's considering giving a speech instead.

articles.title: 52-day trawling ban begins in state from June 9
articles.description: Kerala’s 52-day monsoon trawling ban runs June 9–July 31 to protect fish breeding; patrols, control rooms, sea safety force and free rations planned.

articles.title: 'Minecraft' sequel titled 'A Minecraft Movie Squared', gets 2027 date
articles.description: The sequel to the hit 'Minecraft' movie is officially titled 'A Minecraft Movie Squared' and will release on July 23, 2027. The announcement follows the first film's massive box office success. Kirsten Dunst joins the returning cast and director.

articles.title: Salman Khan gets candid about his luxury watch collection: ‘Mere dost ki ghadi hai...’
Can Chacha Chaudhary outsmart ChatGPT?
articles.description: From eco-conscious Shikari Shambhu to tech-savvy vetalas, India’s comic-book icons are getting a reboot to keep pace with AI, anime & short attention spans

articles.title: Brothers and Sisters on JioHotstar Explores Family Bonds, Chaos and Emotional Memories
articles.description: Brothers and Sisters is a family drama that showcases sibling bonds, emotional struggles and hidden family chaos.

articles.title: ‘Vijay left at peak of his career and stardom to serve people’: Ram Charan hails Tamil Nadu CM, wishes him all the best
articles.description: Ram Charan congratulated the people of Tamil Nadu as well as Vijay in his speech at a promotional event for Peddi.

articles.title: ‘I’ll break your legs’: How Anita Kanwal shielded her teenage daughter from casting couch
articles.description: Anita Kanwal quit acting at her peak to accompany her teen daughter on shoots and protect her from casting couch advances.

articles.title: MrBeast joins CarryMinati to recreate PM Narendra Modi-Giorgia Meloni’s viral Melody moment, internet cannot keep calm
articles.description: MrBeast confirmed previously that CarryMinati will be seen in Beast Games Season 2.

articles.title: Brown trailer out: Karisma Kapoor returns as a troubled cop in dark Neo-Noir thriller | WATCH
articles.description: The trailer of Brown, starring Karisma Kapoor, teases a gritty neo-noir crime thriller set in Kolkata, where a disgraced cop is pulled back into a brutal murder investigation that forces her to confront her past and inner demons.

articles.title: Ram Charan Applauds Tamil Nadu CM Vijay For Leaving Stardom Behind For Public Service: Very Proud Of You
articles.description: At a promotional event for Peddi, Ram Charan heaped praise on Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay, applauding his decision to step away from a flourishing film career and immense stardom to dedicate himself to public service.

articles.title: ‘Begum Barve’ returns to Pune stage as Gaurav Kanekar revives Marathi classic
articles.description: Satish Alekar's 'Begum Barve' will be staged at the Bharat Natya Mandir, Pune, on June 6.

articles.title: Manoj Bajpayee Reveals Childhood Dream & Father’s Medicine Wish for ‘Governor’ Film | Entertainment
articles.description: Bollywood star Manoj Bajpayee opens up about his childhood dream of becoming an actor, his father’s wish for him to become a doctor, and his powerful upcoming film ‘Governor’ inspired by India’s 1990s financial crisis. Emotional journey from struggle to success! In this video: 00:00 - Bajpayee Reveals His Childhood Dream 03:00 - Father Wanted Manoj to Become a Doctor 05:00 - Film Inspired by India's 1990s Financial Crisis

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Forrest Gump actor Tom Hanks: 'Human beings do things for a reason...'-Oscar-winning actor's insight into human nature still rings true decades later
articles.description: Actor Tom Hanks' enduring quote highlights that people act for reasons, even when their choices lead to errors. This perspective encourages understanding over judgment. Hanks' career, marked by portraying relatable characters, mirrors this insight. His words remind us that acknowledging motivations behind actions fosters empathy and personal growth. This understanding shapes compassion for ourselves and others.

articles.title: ‘This is not an anti-women film’: producer Nikhil Dwivedi on tackling sexual assault case in Bobby Deol’s Bandar
articles.description: Bandar, directed by Anurag Kashyap and starring Bobby Deol, delves into the life of a fading celebrity entangled in sexual assault allegations.

articles.title: Varun Dhawan seeks protection of his personality rights; court says it's inclined to pass interim order
articles.description: Varun Dhawan has filed a petition in the Delhi High Court to protect his personality rights amid rising concerns over unauthorized use of identities online.

articles.title: Vishal slams family of Pune Porsche accused for allegedly celebrating after bail: ‘You don’t deserve to rejoice’
articles.description: Two years after the death of two people in the Pune Porsche crash case, a video went viral on social media, which showed the Agarwal family celebrating.

articles.title: Meet 26-year-old Do Aur Do Pyaar actor who designed Alia Bhatt's Alpha, Nawazuddin Siddiqui's Tumbbad 2 posters
articles.description: If you've liked the posters of Bramayugam, Diés Iraé, Vrushakarma, Alpha and Tumbbad 2, meet the actor who designed them.

articles.title: Clive Davis hospitalized in New York with respiratory infection
articles.description: Music mogul Clive Davis, 94, has been hospitalized in New York due to an upper respiratory infection. Admitted as a precaution, his team anticipates a swift release within 24 hours. This news follows his previous health scare with Bell's Palsy in 2021.

articles.title: ‘Nobody wants to see another Ram’: Arun Govil on backlash over Ranbir Kapoor’s Ramayana
articles.description: Arun Govil reacts to trolling over Ranbir Kapoor's Ramayana look, says his portrayal of Lord Rama has become a touchstone.

articles.title: Tanya Mittal gives a sharp reply to Splitsvilla X6 contestant Gullu; says, ‘Happy to break male egos...’
articles.description: During the promotional events for Maa Hai Na, excitement unfolded as Tanya and her rival Gullu (Kushal Tanwar) participated in a playful yet competitive exchange. Their conversation quickly became a hot topic on the internet.

articles.title: Actor Ajith Kumar's mother Mohini Mani passes away at 84 in Chennai
articles.description: Actor Ajith Kumar's mother, Mohini Mani, has died in Chennai at the age of 84. Family sources confirmed the news. Political and film industry figures, including Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay and Kamal Haasan, have paid their condolences.

articles.title: Shahid Kapoor Playfully Teases Rashmika Mandanna Over Viral Cocktail 2 Photoshoot Moment | WATCH
articles.description: Shahid Kapoor took a playful dig at Rashmika Mandanna over their viral Cocktail 2 photoshoot moment, clearing the air around social media speculation.

articles.title: 5 tiny kitchen habits that may be increasing electricity bills quietly
articles.description: There is no sudden spike or obvious mistake. Instead, the loss comes from repetition. A few extra minutes here, a little standby power there, and the numbers begin to add up. In homes where kitchens are busy from morning until night, these five habits can have a larger impact than many people realise.

articles.title: Divyanka Tripathi's heartwarming moment with security guard as she brings twin boys home goes viral
articles.description: Television actress Divyanka Tripathi has won hearts online after a video of her sweetly showing her newborn twin baby boys to her housing society's security guard went viral.

articles.title: Tariq Khan’s ‘Bombay Story’ Featuring Mouni Roy Premieres to Acclaimed Reception at Cannes Film Festival
articles.description: Cannes, France / Mumbai – Internationally acclaimed filmmaker and producer Tariq Khan has once again spotlighted Indian cinematic excellence on the global stage with the prestigious world premiere of his latest feature film, Bombay Story featuring Mouni Roy, at the Cannes Film Festival. Inspired by the powerful and unflinching literary works of legendary Urdu writer [...] The post Tariq Khan’s ‘Bombay Story’ Featuring Mouni Roy Premieres to Acclaimed Reception at Cannes Film Festival appeared first on FM Live .

articles.title: 7 exotic indoor flowering plants that instantly add a touch of luxury to your home
articles.description: Elevate your home with stunning flowering plants. Orchids, anthuriums, and peace lilies bring colour and sophistication. Bromeliads and clivias add tropical flair. Jasmine offers fragrance and beauty. African violets provide charm in compact spaces. These plants transform interiors, creating a vibrant and welcoming atmosphere. Discover how living art can enhance your living spaces.

articles.title: Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt’s son Maddox files to drop Pitt surname amid ongoing family rift reports
articles.description: Reports suggest Brad Pitt’s relationship with his eldest son Maddox Jolie-Pitt has taken another turn, with the latter reportedly filing to drop the actor’s surname.

articles.title: Foreign news schedule for May 30, Saturday
'Can't Take My Eyes Off You' hitmaker Frankie Valli cancels concerts for remainder of 2026 to focus on his health
articles.description: 'Can't Take My Eyes Off You' hitmaker Frankie Valli has cancelled his concerts which are scheduled to take place in the remainder of 2026 to focus on his health.

articles.title: Kerala Lottery Karunya KR-755 Result Today: Rs 1 Crore Jackpot Up for Grabs; Check Draw Time and Details
articles.description: On May 30, 2026, the Kerala State Lottery Department will announce the Karunya KR-755 results. The draw occurs at 3 PM, with a top prize of Rs 1 crore, a second prize of Rs 25 lakh, and a third prize of Rs 10 lakh.

articles.title: Fortnite Community Day timings for all regions, rewards, and more
articles.description: Fortnite's Chapter 7 Season 2 concludes with a 24-hour Community Day event, offering players free cosmetics like the Community 'Brella and Silver Surfer "Reflector" Wrap. The event, running from May 30th to 31st, features unvaulted loot pools and special "Power Hours" with bonus rewards. Indigo Kuno also returns to the Item Shop.

articles.title: 'The Book of Life' director Jorge Gutierrez "drops out" from directing AI series
articles.description: 'The Book of Life' director Jorge Gutierrez wrote on social media on Friday that he was dropping out of a 'Punky Duck 'series that had been announced at Amazon's AI on the Lot event just two days earlier.

articles.title: JLo's child Emme graduates as Oskar Muniz- Pics
articles.description: Jennifer Lopez celebrated her child Oskar Muniz's high school graduation in Los Angeles, attending with her mother and son Max. Ben Affleck's son Samuel was also present, highlighting the blended family's strong ties. Oskar, who graduated in Theater and Studio Arts, will be attending university with his twin Max, a milestone that has left Lopez emotional about their impending departure.
